channel.title: Computer Science on Not a Peeker of Nature
channel.description: Recent content in Computer Science on Not a Peeker of Nature

item.title: Basis_of_computer
item.description: 1.BIOS What? BIOS stands for ‘Basic Input/Output System’. Why? Whether SVM mode (for AMD; VT-x for Intel) is enabled in BIOS can affect the functionality of wsl2.
